sub_modules.fp_fir_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM that maps a tap index to the corresponding IEEE-754 binary32 FIR coefficient word.
sub_modules.fp32_mul: Combinational IEEE-754 binary32 multiplier for finite input values used by each FIR tap.
sub_modules.fp32_add: Combinational IEEE-754 binary32 adder for finite input values used to accumulate tap products.
